title: Northeastern University - Canada.ca
content:
## Northeastern University
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete the degree below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Master of Science in Computer Science
- Master of Science - Data Analytics Engineering
- Master of Science – Information Design and Data Visualization
- Master of Professional Studies – Analytics
- Master of Science in Information Systems
- Master of Professional Studies in Digital Media
- Master of Science in Health Informatics
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
